channel.title: Pages on Johan Sjölén's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Johan Sjölén's blog

item.title: About
item.description:
Hi, I am Johan Sjölén. I’m a software developer. I’m currently employed by Oracle and I work in the runtime team in the Java Platform Group. My title is “Senior Member of Technical Staff.” This blog contains my opinions and thoughts and do not represent those of my employer’s at all.

This blog runs on Hugo, and I use GoatCounter for analytics. As far as I understand, GoatCounter saves no personally identifiable information, so you don’t have to worry about being tracked by me. I just want to know how many hits my blog has :-).

My Github account is johan-sjolen.

My professional e-mail is johan.sjolen@oracle.com – feel free to reach out.

I’m available on LinkedIn as well.
